name: Chunky Black-Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces canned diced tomatoes, no-salt and undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot over medium-high heat, cook the onion, green pepper, and ground chuck until browned, stirring to crumble.
2. Drain any excess fat if necessary, and return the ingredients to the pot.
3. Add beef broth and chili powder through cayenne. Bring mixture to boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Adjust chili powder seasoning to taste preference.
6. Serve with sour cream and/or crusty bread on top.
